$comment: Corpus manifest format (handoff/06-QUALITY-EVAL.md §1). The real corpus is assembled in M0.D and kept out of the repo when clips are private; the redistributable/synthetic subset is published separately as 'anvil-bench' for the honest launch benchmark. This example documents the schema and seeds two synthetic, redistributable clips. Classes are the 12 failure classes; each needs >=3 clips before the M1 blind gate.

clips.source: synthetic: LibriSpeech test-clean utterance, no degradation (must-not-degrade control)
clips.notes: Control clip: all processing deltas must be >= -0.05 DNSMOS.

clips.source: synthetic: clean speech + MUSAN fan noise mixed at +10 dB SNR (paired reference retained)
clips.notes: Paired synthetic degradation enables intrusive metrics (PESQ/STOI).
